* **溝通表達能力問卷回應範例**

## Example QuestionnaireResponse: 溝通表達能力問卷回應範例

Profile: [照顧管理評估量表－個案溝通能力問卷回覆](StructureDefinition-LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSCommunication.md)

* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ltc-questionnaire-response-communication-example
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): Questionnaire:[LTCQuestionnaireCommunication](Questionnaire-ltc-questionnaire-communication.md)
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)C1
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案意識狀態
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 清醒
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)C2
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案視力
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 正常
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)C3
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案聽力
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 適當
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)C4
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案表達能力
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 良好
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](icon-q-string.png)C5
  * [Text](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 個案理解能力
  * [Definition](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): 
  * [Answer](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table)![](data:image/png;base64,): 良好
* [LinkID](https://hl7.org/fhir/R4/formats.html#table): ![](data:image/png;base64,) Documentation for this format

  "resourceType" : "QuestionnaireResponse",
  "id" : "ltc-questionnaire-response-communication-example",
  "meta" : {
    "profile" : ["http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/StructureDefinition/LTCQuestionnaireResponseCMSCommunication"]

  "questionnaire" : "http://ltc-ig.fhir.tw/Questionnaire/ltc-questionnaire-communication",
  "status" : "completed",
  "subject" : {
    "reference" : "Patient/ltc-patient-cms-chen-ming-hui-example"
  },
  "authored" : "2024-09-15T10:30:00+08:00",
  "item" : [{
    "linkId" : "C1",
    "text" : "個案意識狀態",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "清醒"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "C2",
    "text" : "個案視力",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "正常"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "C3",
    "text" : "個案聽力",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "適當"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "C4",
    "text" : "個案表達能力",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "良好"
    }]
  },
  {
    "linkId" : "C5",
    "text" : "個案理解能力",
    "answer" : [{
      "valueString" : "良好"
    }]
  }]
}
